description: Declarative source->runtime clip mapping for the Retro Weapon Pack first-person arms. Single source of truth for the semantic clip vocabulary, per-weapon naming quirks, and which clips the game runtime consumes today. Consumed by scripts/build-retro-manifest.py, scripts/retro-preflight.py and scripts/verify-retro-manifest.py; intended to also drive scripts/blend-to-gltf.blender.py in a later checkpoint. Editing this file changes what the preflight/verify tools require -- keep it in sync with the archive.

runtimeAnims.note: The blend-to-gltf pipeline names each exported glTF animation after its semantic key; the game (common/weaponsConfig.js authoredMount.anims + client/graphics/Viewmodel.js) references idle/fire/reload/draw. A null runtime means the clip is staged for the fuller pipeline but not consumed yet.

idle.note: Looping breathing cycle; the equipped idle. NB the current blend-to-gltf.blender.py still uses BasePose (see base_pose) as its idle placeholder -- migrating idle onto Breathing is a later-checkpoint behavioral change, out of scope here.

segmented.note: Pump-action shotgun has no single Reload clip; the reload is authored as segments and loads two shells via Start+Step+Step+End (matches reload_clips() in blend-to-gltf.blender.py).

interact.note: Shotgun spells this clip 'Interaction' where every other weapon uses 'Interact'.

base_pose.note: Static neutral pose; current blend-to-gltf idle placeholder.

groups.core: Required for every weapon in the fuller pipeline.
groups.aim: Optional ADS (aim-down-sights) set. Assert as a complete group when present.

quirks: Shotgun uses 'Interaction' where other weapons use 'Interact' (interact.spelling).
Shotgun reload is segmented (ReloadStart/ReloadStep/ReloadEnd) with no single Reload clip (reload.segmented).
Gun subtrees alternate folder casing: Pistol_01/Shotgun_01 use 'FbxFiles', Rifle_01/SMG_01 use 'Fbx_Files'.
Rifle_01 and SMG_01 gun animation folders lack an EmptyMagazine clip that Pistol_01 has; Shotgun_01 gun anims are BasePose/Fire/ReloadEnd/ReloadStep only (no gun-side ReloadStart).
